name: io.github.Whatsonyourmind/deckforge
description: Generate executive-ready presentations from natural language or JSON IR. 32 slide types (23 universal + 9 finance), 24 chart types, 15 themes, native PPTX + Google Slides output. MCP tools: render, generate, list themes, list slide types, estimate cost, preview. Remote streamable-http endpoint available.

environmentVariables.name: DECKFORGE_ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Anthropic API key for Claude content generation (one LLM key required)

environmentVariables.name: DECKFORGE_OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for content generation

environmentVariables.name: DECKFORGE_DATABASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: PostgreSQL connection string (defaults to SQLite for dev)

environmentVariables.name: DECKFORGE_REDIS_URL
environmentVariables.description: Redis URL for queue + cache (default redis://localhost:6379/0)

remotes.description: Remote MCP endpoint — production API on Render. No local install needed; point your MCP client here.
